name: Draining Talisman
setBonus: 3 of Set: Astral Absorption — While taking damage, you will begin to subtly drain the energy of your attackers. If you are reduced below 75% health, this stored energy will explode forth, damaging all nearby enemies for 21,795 arcane damage, and shielding you from 103,225 damage for 4s. If reduced below 25% health, additional energy will burst forth, dealing 43,590 to all nearby enemies, as well as stunning them for 2s. Additionally, this second burst will heal nearby party members for 194,684 health. Each of these effects may only occur every 10s.

name: Detector's Choker
setBonus: 3 of Set: Unstable Scan — Increases the duration of the Portable Spelljammer Detector's resistance debuff by 2s. Using Encounter powers grants 1% Combat Advantage, Forte, and Overall Outgoing Healing for 10s. Max 7 stacks.

name: Sash of Shooting Stars

equipBonuses.name: Astral Dash refinement
equipBonuses.description: Improves set bonuses of the item set Astral Dash based on the refinement level of this item.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Astral Dash — When you stand still for 3 seconds, your Base Damage Boost and Movement Speed are increased by 4%. Effect will persist for a brief period after moving.

equipBonuses.name: Astral Dash refinement
equipBonuses.description: Improves set bonuses of the item set Astral Dash based on the refinement level of this item.

name: Belt of Blinding Radiance

equipBonuses.name: Rune of Replenishment refinement
equipBonuses.description: Improves duration of the item set Rune of Replenishment based on the refinement level of this item.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Rune of Replenishment — When you receive damage or heal an ally, you will also create a rune on the ground for 4 seconds. Anyone standing within the rune's radius will be healed for 12,500 hitpoints each second, and receive 5% Awareness and Critical Strike. 20s cooldown. Does not stack with other Runes of Replenishment.
source: Heroic Encounters: Doomspace and Xaryxispace; Adventures in Wildspace Campaign

name: Pendant of Eternal Light

equipBonuses.name: Rune of Replenishment refinement
equipBonuses.description: Improves duration of the item set Rune of Replenishment based on the refinement level of this item.

source: Heroic Encounters: Doomspace and Xaryxispace; Adventures in Wildspace Campaign

name: Perfect Justice of Lolth
setBonus: 2 of Set: Your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 3%. Your incoming damage is reduced by up to 7.5% when your Stamina is empty. At the start of Combat, your Critical Strike and Critical Severity increase by 1%. For every 5 seconds you are in combat, these increase by 1%. (Maximum 5% increase).

name: Duergar Mercenary's Steel Mace
setBonus: 2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted the following: +2% Base Damage Boost, +2% Overall Outgoing Healing, -2% Incoming Damage. This effect shall stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of Duergar weapons.

name: The Weaver's Mace
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and your role. You and nearby allies are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +3% Base Damage Boost; Tank: -3% Incoming Damage; Healer: +2% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect may stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons. When in the Underdark, your Damage is increased by 5%.

equipBonuses.name: Underdark Hunter
equipBonuses.description: +5% Damage in the Underdark.

equipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Accuracy
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Accuracy, to the max of 12%.

equipBonuses.name: Magician's Fury
equipBonuses.description: When you are 25' or further away from your target, your Power is increased by 6%.

equipBonuses.name: Death Defying Advantage
equipBonuses.description: Gain 2% Combat Advantage for each enemy you are engaged in battle within 100'. (Max of 10 targets)

equipBonuses.name: Abyssal Might
equipBonuses.description: When you use an encounter power, you have a 15% chance to gain 10% Critical Severity for 6 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Provoker's Stance
equipBonuses.description: Increases your Critical Avoidance and Awareness by up to 7.5% whenever your stamina gauge is full. This effect decreases as remaining stamina decreases. When you run out of stamina, gain 30% Stamina Regeneration for 5 seconds. (10 seconds cooldown).

equipBonuses.name: Daily Burst
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, deal 300 magnitude damage around you. (30 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Brute's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: When you are 25' or closer to your target, your Combat Advantage is increased by 5%.

equipBonuses.name: Raging Rally
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next three strikes from encounter powers will deal 7.5% more damage. This power expires when combat ends. (30 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Rage
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Rage, increasing your Critical Severity by 3% but decreasing your Deflect by 1% for 5 seconds. (Max stack 6)

equipBonuses.name: Mighty Valor
equipBonuses.description: When you strike an enemy, gain 1% Power and Awareness and lose 2.5% Movement Speed for 4 seconds. (Max stack 10)

equipBonuses.name: Brute's Tactics
equipBonuses.description: When you are 20' or closer to your target, your Defense is increased by 5%. When you are 20' or further away from your target, your Critical Severity is increased by 5%.

equipBonuses.name: Butcher's Focus
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1% Critical Strike for 10 seconds. (Max stack 10)

equipBonuses.name: Critical Harmony
equipBonuses.description: You gain 1.5% Outgoing Healing for each player in your team. When your teammates are 20' or closer to you, their Critical Strike is increased by 2%.

equipBonuses.name: Charged Expertise
equipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, gain 5% Critical Strike and Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Miracle Crit
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you critically heal a teammate with a single-target heal, the target and up to 4 nearby teammates receive 3% Combat Advantage and Critical Avoidance for 4 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Strike
equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Accuracy is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Recharge Speed is increased by 20%.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Action
equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Action Point Gain is increased by 7.5%. When your health is below 50%, Stamina Regeneration is increased by 15%.

equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Strike is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Critical Avoidance is increased by 10,000.

equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Severity is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Movement Speed is increased by 20%.

equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Accuracy is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Recharge Speed is increased by 20%.

equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Strike is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Critical Avoidance is increased by 10,000.

equipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Severity is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Movement Speed is increased by 20%.

equipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you will take 3% less damage for 10 seconds. Cooldown 30 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Daily Burst
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, deal 250 magnitude damage around you. (30 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Brute's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: When you are 25' or closer to your target, your Combat Advantage and Accuracy is increased by 3,000.

equipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Ferocity
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to gain 10000 Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Power Siphon
equipBonuses.description: Your powers have a 10% chance to siphon energy from your target, creating a nearby orb which can be picked up to grant you 10000 Power for 5 seconds. (5 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Renegade's Stamina
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 3% Stamina Regeneration for 10 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 10% Stamina Regeneration

equipBonuses.name: Critical Rebuff
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by a Critical Strike, you have a 10% chance to increase your Deflect Severity by 7.5% for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: The Ol' Switcharoo
equipBonuses.description: +5% Critical Strike, -5% Deflect Severity

equipBonuses.name: Graceful Harmony
equipBonuses.description: You gain 1% Outgoing Healing for each player in your team. When your teammates are 20' or closer to you, their Forte is increased by 1%.

equipBonuses.name: Charged Expertise
equipBonuses.description: When your Stamina is over 75%, gain 3000 Critical Strike and Forte.

equipBonuses.name: This or That
equipBonuses.description: When in a party, gain 50,000 Maximum Hit Points. When in a party, gain 5500 Outgoing Healing and Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Fanged Vice
equipBonuses.description: When you use an encounter power, the next enemy that attacks you takes damage equal to 5% of your max health. (10 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Fount of Power
equipBonuses.description: When you receive a heal that puts you at 100% of your Maximum Hit Points while in combat, you have a 20% chance to drop 5 orbs around you that can be collected by you or other members of your party to gain 15% Action Point over 8 seconds. This can only occur once every 30 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Awareness Escalation
equipBonuses.description: Gain 1,800 Awareness for 10 seconds when struck by an enemy, lose a stack when you strike. Stacks 5 times.

equipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Apothecary's Repel
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, you knockback all enemies within 20 feet away from you and allies within 20 feet of you gain 1.5% Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (30 second cooldown) (Not usable in PvP)

equipBonuses.name: Fount of Healing (Greater)
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 30% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you drop 5 orbs around you that can be collected by you or other members of your party to heal for 15% of their Maximum Hit Points over 8 seconds. Anyone who picks up an orb gains 1% Forte for 10 seconds. (30 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Healing Foci
equipBonuses.description: When casting a single target heal on a target, gain 2% Critical Strike (max stack 5) for 5 seconds. The target receives 2% Incoming Healing (max stack 5) for 3 seconds.

equipBonuses.description: Slightly increased threat generation.
